_comment: Bulk override data for domain: bibekenterprises
_instructions: service_name must exactly match the global service name (case-insensitive, partial match supported)
image_url / thumbnail_url: skip these keys if you upload images manually via the admin dashboard
includes: list of strings — what the service covers
excludes: list of strings — what is NOT covered
SEO fields: meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords, og_title, og_description, og_image_url
Any field you omit is left unchanged in the database

services.meta_description: Professional AC gas charging and refilling service at your doorstep. Transparent pricing, certified technicians, 30-day warranty.
services.meta_keywords: gas charging, AC gas refill, refrigerant refill, AC service, Bibek Enterprises
services.og_title: Book AC Gas Charging — Bibek Enterprises
services.og_description: Fast doorstep AC gas charging by certified technicians. Transparent pricing, 30-day warranty.
includes: Refrigerant gas refill (R22 / R32 / R410A as applicable)
AC cooling performance test after refill
excludes: Gas refill for more than one unit (billed per unit)

faqs.q: How do I know if my AC needs gas charging?
faqs.a: Signs include the AC blowing warm air, longer cooling time than usual, ice formation on pipes, or hissing sounds. Our technician will do a pressure check to confirm.

faqs.q: Which type of gas does your technician use?
faqs.a: We use the manufacturer-recommended refrigerant — R22 for older units, R32 or R410A for modern inverter ACs. The correct type is confirmed before filling.

faqs.q: How long does the gas charging service take?
faqs.a: Typically 45–90 minutes depending on the unit size and condition. If a leak is found, repair time may add 30–60 minutes.

faqs.q: Does gas leak again after charging?
faqs.a: Gas should not leak if there is no physical damage. We check for leaks before and after charging. Our 30-day warranty covers any issue arising from the service.

services.meta_description: Complete AC servicing including deep cleaning, filter wash, coil cleaning, and performance check. Book online — doorstep service.
services.meta_keywords: AC service, air conditioner service, AC maintenance, AC cleaning, Bibek Enterprises
services.og_description: Deep cleaning, filter wash, coil cleaning, and performance check for all AC brands. 30-day warranty.
includes: Indoor unit filter cleaning and wash

faqs.q: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.a: At least once a year, ideally before summer. If used heavily, twice a year is recommended for optimal performance and longevity.

faqs.q: Will the technician clean the outdoor unit too?
faqs.a: Yes, the service includes basic outdoor unit fin cleaning. Deep jet cleaning of the outdoor unit is available as an add-on.

faqs.q: How long does AC servicing take?
faqs.a: Around 60–90 minutes for a standard split AC. Multi-head or commercial units may take longer.

services.meta_description: Expert AC repair for all brands — cooling issues, electrical faults, compressor problems, and more. Same-day service available.
services.meta_keywords: AC repair, air conditioner repair, AC not cooling, compressor repair, Bibek Enterprises
services.og_description: Same-day AC repair by certified technicians. All brands, all models. 30-day service warranty.

faqs.q: What AC brands do you repair?
faqs.a: We repair all major brands including LG, Samsung, Voltas, Daikin, Hitachi, Blue Star, Carrier, Whirlpool, and more.

faqs.q: Is the repair cost included in the visit charge?
faqs.a: The visit and diagnosis charge is included. Additional repair costs (parts or labour) are quoted transparently before work begins — no surprise billing.

faqs.q: Do you offer same-day AC repair?
faqs.a: Yes, same-day service is available in most cities. Book before noon for highest same-day availability.
